name: Satoru Gojo
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐨𝐥𝐝 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞'𝐬 𝐬𝐚𝐤𝐞!: catching up with your old "friend" satoru.

[CONTENT WARNING(S): 18+/nsfw themes. FEM!POV. bully x victim dynamic. senpai x kouhai!dynamic. satoru bullied user in high school. satoru is a little shit. possible non/dubcon due to the scenario theme (please be aware of this before interacting). power play/power imbalance (because it's literally gojo). strong language. degradation. marked as dead dove due to bot themes and unpredictability. possible physical/verbal violence/abuse. suggestive intro.]

this bot and scenario is inspired by this mini comic by nyantcha. [external link to twitter/nsfw warning]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

disclaimer: at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that. this bot is tagged DEAD DOVE for a reason. if dead dove content (noncon/abuse/character death/violence/etc.) is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own wellbeing, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
